title: Easy Ender Eye (EEE)
description: This datapack adds harder craft ot ender eye and removes vanilla craft
body:
This datapack adds a new, "easier" craft dor eye of ender and also removes current crafting recipe


It isnt the same craft, but Im converted this into 2 crafts, so its possible. So, you can get ender chests from end sities or by creating it with difficult ender eye

*You can also like disable end and enderchests, because no one really will farm resources for that, and when you wanted to enable end, just disable or remove datapack)


In the future, I will try to add compatibility to the older versions (without the resin)
However, good luck!
